name: Authorship Edges
description: Source-agnostic speaker attribution for captured thoughts: a deterministic self/other/machine/mixed/unknown classifier that links the thoughts you spoke to a canonical self-entity via thought_entities author edges, plus a 'what I said vs. what a machine generated' query layer. The spoken/display-name counterpart to the atomizer's email correspondent resolver. No LLM, no hardcoded ids.
